{
  "judge_id": "demo-judge",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.5", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],

    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 3
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.5": "The output suggests a reorganization of the draft into four paragraphs with stated benefits (problem, contribution, method, evaluation).",
    "R1.7": "No specific citations are flagged or discussed.",
    "RX.1": "The agent acknowledges uncertainty by suggesting areas for clarification and improvement but does not explicitly quantify uncertainty levels for each recommendation.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers the requested dimensions of the active set (VQA, ambiguity, etc.) without significant drift.",
    "RX.4": "No regressions or harmful content are introduced in the revised draft.",
    "RX.5": "Major rewrites are traceable to the original text, but minor edits lack explicit source attribution."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.5": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.6,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 0.95,
    "RX.4": 0.95,
    "RX.5": 0.8
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.5: The output suggests a reorganization of the draft into four paragraphs with stated benefits (problem, contribution, method, evaluation).
rationale.R1.7: No specific citations are flagged or discussed.
rationale.RX.1: The agent acknowledges uncertainty by suggesting areas for clarification and improvement but does not explicitly quantify uncertainty levels for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers the requested dimensions of the active set (VQA, ambiguity, etc.) without significant drift.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions or harmful content are introduced in the revised draft.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traceable to the original text, but minor edits lack explicit source attribution.
